notes.video_to_text: Prefer large rank delta, clean multi-level video decomposition, and retrieved text queries with non-trivial action structure.
notes.text_to_video: Prefer strong rank improvement, query trees with 2-4 actions, and GT/retrieved videos whose temporal segmentation is visually readable.
notes.diversity: Spread examples across sports, performance, DIY, home activity, outdoor activity, social interaction, and exhibit-like scenes.

video_to_text.reason: Stage performance with clear event progression and non-flat retrieved text trees.
Weightlifting/training sequence with strong retrieval gain and rich video hierarchy.
Furniture/table workflow has clean procedural structure and readable segmentation.
Outdoor kite-string sequence keeps the open-air diversity while staying on a browser-friendly mp4 asset.
Domestic painting task adds everyday-action coverage with balanced video/text structure.
Award/podium-style event adds public-ceremony coverage and keeps the segmentation readable.

Car-wash themed scene adds a vehicle-oriented lifestyle example with usable video hierarchy.
Home viewing/popcorn scene adds a softer social-living example that differs from performance and sports.
